data.title: Meta Documents Reveal Secret Policy Protecting Big-Spender Advertisers From Automated Content Moderation: Report
data.description: Meta's internal documents reportedly reveal a policy that shields high-spending advertisers from automated content moderation, sparking controversy over fairness and transparency in the company's advertising practices.

data.title: Coinbase Subpoenaed Over Polymarket Involvement, Federal Agency Seeks Customer Information
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has issued a subpoena to cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) regarding its association with the prediction platform Polymarket, according to a Thursday report.

data.title: Nvidia's AI Growth Boosts Advantest's Strategic Position In AI Chip Supply Chain, Stock Shows Strong Correlation With Jensen Huang-Led Tech Giant
data.description: Japanese semiconductor testing equipment maker Advantest Corp. has emerged as a key beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom, with its stock showing a remarkable 0.93 correlation coefficient with NVIDIA Corp. over the past three years, highlighting its strategic position in the AI chip supply chain.

data.title: $100 Invested In Broadcom 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Amazon Workers Return To Office With Some Exceptions Reported
data.description: Amazon began enforcing its global return-to-office policy on Monday, but there have been some exceptions reported.
